metadata.description: Sarthi — your AI charioteer for Claude Code. Detects intent and routes to the right tool automatically.

plugins.name: sarthi
plugins.description: Sarthi (Sanskrit: charioteer/guide) detects what you're trying to do and routes to the right Claude Code tool automatically — graphify, compound-engineering, codex, firecrawl, and more. Falls back gracefully to vanilla Claude when tools aren't installed. Includes a universal cost-guard to prevent runaway sessions.
